prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫在1964年世博会预言文章中描述了自动驾驶汽车
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，汽车将配备'机器人大脑'——由计算机编程设定目的地后，汽车将自动驾驶到指定地点，无需人类驾驶员的干预。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov described self-driving cars in his 1964 World's Fair essay
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, vehicles will be equipped with 'robot-brains' — cars that have been programmed to travel to specific destinations will negotiate the path by themselves, without human intervention."
prophecies.verdict_zh: Google于2009年启动自动驾驶项目（后独立为Waymo），到2014年已在公共道路上完成超过70万英里自动驾驶测试。特斯拉于2014年推出Autopilot系统。阿西莫夫对自动驾驶汽车的预测已基本实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Google launched its self-driving car project in 2009 (later spun off as Waymo), completing over 700,000 miles of autonomous driving on public roads by 2014. Tesla introduced Autopilot in 2014. Asimov's prediction of self-driving cars has been substantially realized.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测视频通话将成为现实
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，通讯将变为视听双向的：你不仅能听到对方的声音，还能看到对方的画面。你可以通过屏幕打电话，既能看到你正在交谈的人，也能让对方看到你。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted video calling would become reality
prophecies.a_en: "Communications will become sight-sound and you will see as well as hear the person you telephone. The screen can be used not only to see the people you call but also to study documents and photographs and read passages from books."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年，FaceTime、Skype、微信视频通话等应用已高度普及。阿西莫夫还准确预测了屏幕可用于查看文件和照片——这正是现代智能手机和平板电脑的核心功能。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2014, FaceTime, Skype, WeChat video calls and similar applications were highly prevalent. Asimov also accurately predicted screens being used to view documents and photos — precisely the core function of modern smartphones and tablets.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测机器人将取代人类完成繁重劳动
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，机器人将既不常见也不发达，但它们已经存在了。机器人不是人形的，而是为特定任务设计的自动化装置，用于替代人类完成重复性的日常工作。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted robots would replace humans in routine labor
prophecies.a_en: "Robots will neither be common nor very good in 2014, but they will be in existence. They will not be humanoid but will be designed for specific tasks — automated devices to replace routine human labor."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年，工业机器人已广泛应用于制造业，iRobot扫地机器人进入千家万户，仓储机器人Kiva被亚马逊大规模部署。机器人确实不是人形的，而是为特定任务设计的，与阿西莫夫的描述高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2014, industrial robots were widely used in manufacturing, iRobot vacuum cleaners entered millions of homes, and Kiva warehouse robots were deployed at scale by Amazon. Robots were indeed non-humanoid and designed for specific tasks, closely matching Asimov's description.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测计算机将彻底改变教育
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，所有学生将在家中通过计算机化的导师学习。学生可以按照自己的节奏学习，教育将变得高度个性化。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted computers would transform education
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, all students will learn from computerized tutors at home. Students will be able to learn at their own pace, and education will become highly personalized."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年，可汗学院、Coursera、edX等在线教育平台已拥有数百万用户。虽然并非「所有学生」都在家学习，但个性化计算机辅助教育已经是现实。2020年新冠疫情更是加速了在线教育的全面普及。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2014, Khan Academy, Coursera, edX and other online education platforms had millions of users. While not 'all students' were learning at home, personalized computer-assisted education was already a reality. The COVID-19 pandemic in 2020 further accelerated the universal adoption of online education.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测人类将面临严重的无聊危机
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，精神疾病中最普遍的一种将是无聊症。当机器人取代了大部分工作，人类将面临一个严峻的问题：如何度过大量的闲暇时间。人类社会中最幸运的人将是那些能从事创造性工作的人。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted humanity would face a boredom crisis
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, the most glorious single word in the vocabulary will have become 'work'. The most common mental disorder will be boredom. The lucky few who can be involved in creative work will be the true elite of mankind."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然2014年尚未出现大规模「无聊症」，但社交媒体成瘾、注意力缺陷等现代心理问题确实与信息过载和自动化导致的意义缺失有关。随着AI进一步取代工作岗位，阿西莫夫关于创造性工作者将成为精英阶层的预判正在逐步显现。
prophecies.verdict_en: While a mass 'boredom epidemic' had not emerged by 2014, modern psychological issues such as social media addiction and attention deficit are indeed related to information overload and loss of meaning from automation. As AI further displaces jobs, Asimov's prediction that creative workers would become the elite is increasingly relevant.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测3D电影和墙壁屏幕
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，墙壁大小的平面电视屏幕将进入千家万户，可用于观看3D节目。透明的立方体将展示三维影像，你可以从各个角度欣赏舞者的表演。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted flat-screen wall TVs and 3D entertainment
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, wall-sized flat-screen TV sets will be in common use. Transparent cubes will display three-dimensional images, allowing viewers to watch dancers perform from every angle."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年，大尺寸平板电视已完全普及，4K超高清成为主流标准。3D电影技术（如《阿凡达》2009年引爆市场）也已实现。虽然家用「透明立方体」全息显示尚未商用，但平面大屏幕的预测完全准确。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2014, large flat-screen TVs were ubiquitous and 4K Ultra HD became mainstream. 3D movie technology (popularized by Avatar in 2009) was also realized. While home 'transparent cube' holographic displays were not yet commercial, the prediction of flat wall-sized screens was entirely accurate.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测无线电器将普及
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，电器将不再有电线。它们将通过长寿命电池供电。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted wireless appliances would be common
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, appliances will have no electric cords. They will be powered by long-lived batteries."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年，智能手机、平板电脑、无线耳机、蓝牙音箱等无线设备已全面普及。锂电池技术的进步使得便携设备可以长时间使用。虽然大型家电仍需接线，但便携设备的无线化已完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2014, smartphones, tablets, wireless earbuds, Bluetooth speakers and other wireless devices were fully mainstream. Advances in lithium battery technology enabled long-lasting portable devices. While large appliances still require wiring, the wireless revolution for portable devices was fully realized.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫在小说中构想了人工智能的伦理框架
prophecies.a: 「一、机器人不得伤害人类，或坐视人类受到伤害而袖手旁观。二、机器人必须服从人类的命令，除非该命令与第一定律相冲突。三、机器人必须保护自身存在，前提是不与第一或第二定律相冲突。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov envisioned an ethical framework for AI in his novels
prophecies.a_en: "First Law: A robot may not injure a human being or, through inaction, allow a human being to come to harm. Second Law: A robot must obey the orders given it by human beings except where such orders would conflict with the First Law. Third Law: A robot must protect its own existence as long as such protection does not conflict with the First or Second Law."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2024年，AI伦理已成为全球科技治理的核心议题。欧盟《人工智能法案》（2024年生效）、各国AI治理框架的核心原则与阿西莫夫三定律的精神高度相似——优先保护人类安全、AI须服从人类控制。但现实中的AI伦理框架远比三定律复杂，且执行层面仍面临巨大挑战。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2024, AI ethics became a central issue in global technology governance. The EU AI Act (effective 2024) and various national AI governance frameworks share core principles remarkably similar to Asimov's Three Laws — prioritizing human safety and requiring AI to remain under human control. However, real-world AI ethics frameworks are far more complex than the Three Laws, and enforcement remains a major challenge.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测太空站将投入使用
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，一个或多个太空站将在绕地球轨道上运行，作为中继站用于前往月球和其他行星的旅行。太空实验室将接收太阳能，用于地球上的各种用途。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted space stations would be operational
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, one or more space stations will be orbiting the Earth, serving as relay stations for travel to the Moon and beyond. Space labs will receive solar energy for various uses on Earth."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 国际空间站（ISS）自2000年起持续载人运行，到2014年已是人类最大的在轨建筑。但ISS并未被用作月球或行星旅行的中继站，太空太阳能发电也未实现商业化。空间站的存在得到验证，但其用途与阿西莫夫设想有差距。
prophecies.verdict_en: The International Space Station (ISS) has been continuously occupied since 2000 and by 2014 was humanity's largest orbital structure. However, it has not served as a relay station for lunar or planetary travel, and space-based solar power has not been commercialized. The existence of space stations is verified, but their uses differ from Asimov's vision.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测世界人口将达到65亿
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted world population would reach 6.5 billion
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年世界人口约为72.4亿，超出了阿西莫夫的预测。不过考虑到1964年世界人口仅约32亿，阿西莫夫预测到人口将翻倍是正确的趋势判断，只是低估了增长速度。
prophecies.verdict_en: World population in 2014 was approximately 7.24 billion, exceeding Asimov's estimate. However, considering the world population was only about 3.2 billion in 1964, Asimov correctly predicted the population would double — he simply underestimated the growth rate.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测核聚变发电将实现
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，实验性核聚变发电站将投入使用。大型太阳能发电站将在沙漠地区建成，作为核聚变的补充能源。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted nuclear fusion power plants
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, an experimental fusion-power plant or two will already exist. Large solar-power stations will be built in desert areas as a supplement to fusion power."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2014年，核聚变发电尚未实现商用（ITER项目仍在建设中）。但沙漠大型太阳能电站的预测已应验——美国伊万帕太阳能电站（2014年投入运行）和中国多个大型光伏基地建在沙漠地区。核聚变部分未实现，太阳能部分已实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2014, commercial nuclear fusion power had not been achieved (the ITER project was still under construction). However, the prediction of large desert solar stations came true — the Ivanpah Solar Power Facility (operational in 2014) and several large Chinese photovoltaic bases were built in desert areas. The fusion part was not realized, but the solar part was.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测地下城市和海底居住
prophecies.a: 「随着人口增长和土地压力增大，人类将开始向地下和海底发展居住空间。地下城市将配备人工照明和气候控制系统。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov predicted underground cities and undersea living
prophecies.a_en: "As population grows and land pressure increases, humans will begin developing underground and undersea living spaces. Underground cities will have artificial lighting and climate control systems."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2014年，大规模地下城市和海底居住尚未成为现实。但地下空间开发已有显著进展：蒙特利尔地下城（RESO）拥有33公里地下通道，赫尔辛基正在建设地下总体规划。地下商业区和交通枢纽已在全球多个城市存在，但尚未达到阿西莫夫设想的「城市」规模。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2014, large-scale underground cities and undersea living had not materialized. However, underground space development has progressed significantly: Montreal's RESO has 33 km of underground tunnels, and Helsinki was developing an underground master plan. Underground commercial districts and transit hubs exist in many cities worldwide, but have not reached the 'city' scale Asimov envisioned.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫在「基地」系列中构想了用数学预测文明走向
prophecies.a: 「通过心理史学——一门结合了历史学、社会学和数学的学科——可以用数学公式精确预测大规模人群的未来行为走向。个体行为不可预测，但数十亿人组成的群体行为可以被统计学精确计算。」
prophecies.q_en: Asimov envisioned using mathematics to predict civilization in the Foundation series
prophecies.a_en: "Through psychohistory — a discipline combining history, sociology, and mathematics — the future behavior of large populations can be precisely predicted using mathematical formulas. Individual behavior is unpredictable, but the behavior of billions can be calculated statistically."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2024年，大数据分析和预测算法已广泛应用于社会治理、选举预测、市场分析等领域。Google、Facebook等科技公司利用海量用户数据预测群体行为模式。虽然尚未达到心理史学的精确程度，但用数学模型预测大规模社会趋势的理念已成为现实。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2024, big data analytics and predictive algorithms were widely used in governance, election forecasting, and market analysis. Tech companies like Google and Meta leverage massive user data to predict group behavior patterns. While not yet reaching psychohistory's precision, the concept of using mathematical models to predict large-scale social trends has become reality.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测人类将在月球上建立殖民地
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，月球上将建立小型永久基地，作为天文观测站和科研中心使用。地月之间将有定期航班往返。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, small permanent lunar bases will be established, serving as astronomical observatories and research centers. Regular shuttle flights between Earth and Moon will operate."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2014年，人类自1972年阿波罗17号之后再未登月。月球上既无永久基地，也无定期航班。NASA的阿尔忒弥斯计划（2025年后）才重新计划载人登月。这是阿西莫夫最乐观的预测之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2014, no human had returned to the Moon since Apollo 17 in 1972. There were no permanent lunar bases or regular shuttle flights. NASA's Artemis program (post-2025) has only recently planned crewed lunar missions again. This was one of Asimov's most optimistic predictions.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测厨房将实现自动烹饪
prophecies.a: 「到2014年，完整的晚餐将由'预编程'的方式自动准备好。早餐的菜单可以在前一晚设定好，到时间就自动烹制完成。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2014, complete meals will be 'pre-programmed'. The menu for the evening meal can be set the night before to be ready by a specific time."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年，智能厨电已初具雏形：可编程慢炖锅、面包机和咖啡机可定时烹制食物。但完全自动化的「预编程」烹饪——从备料到上菜——仍未实现。Thermomix等多功能料理机部分实现了这一构想。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2014, smart kitchen appliances were emerging: programmable slow cookers, bread makers, and coffee machines could prepare food on a timer. However, fully automated 'pre-programmed' cooking — from prep to serving — was not yet realized. Multi-function cookers like Thermomix partially fulfilled this vision.

prophecies.q: 阿西莫夫预测人类将面临人口过剩危机
prophecies.a: 「人类最大的威胁不是核战争，而是人口过剩。到2014年，人口增长将给地球资源造成巨大压力，粮食和淡水将变得越来越稀缺。控制人口将成为最紧迫的政治议题。」
prophecies.a_en: "Mankind's greatest threat is not nuclear war but overpopulation. By 2014, population growth will place enormous strain on Earth's resources. Food and fresh water will become increasingly scarce. Population control will become the most urgent political issue."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年世界人口已超72亿，资源压力确实存在——全球约8亿人面临饥饿，水资源短缺影响数十亿人。但人口控制并未成为「最紧迫」的政治议题；气候变化和经济不平等更受关注。阿西莫夫正确预见了资源压力，但高估了人口问题的政治紧迫性。
prophecies.verdict_en: World population exceeded 7.2 billion by 2014, and resource pressure was real — about 800 million people faced hunger, and water scarcity affected billions. However, population control did not become the 'most urgent' political issue; climate change and economic inequality received more attention. Asimov correctly foresaw resource pressure but overestimated the political urgency of the population issue.
